name: io.github.msartem/copilot-cowork-mcp
description: Connect GitHub Copilot CLI to Microsoft 365 Copilot (Cowork) — query emails, calendar, Teams, meetings, documents, send messages, and send images via Teams or as email attachments, all from the terminal.

environmentVariables.description: Manual JWT token override (skips browser auth)
environmentVariables.name: COWORK_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Browser for sign-in: msedge, chrome, or chromium
environmentVariables.name: COWORK_BROWSER
